metadata.description: Short project identifier used in resource names.
Globally-unique suffix (e.g. 8-char hex) to avoid naming collisions.
PostgreSQL admin password.  Must be strong.
Minimum replicas (0 = scale-to-zero for dev cost savings).
Docker image tag to deploy (e.g. dev-latest or git SHA).
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the Application Insights instance
Subnet name for Container Apps environment
CIDR for Container Apps subnet (must be /23 or larger)
CIDR for PostgreSQL subnet (must be /28 or larger)
Globally unique PostgreSQL flexible server name
Resource ID of the delegated subnet for private VNet access
Resource ID of the VNet (for private DNS zone linking)
Globally unique Key Vault name (3–24 alphanumeric + hyphens)
Name of the Container App Environment
Subnet resource ID for VNet integration
Public URL exposed to users (Front Door endpoint)
Globally unique Front Door profile name
Log Analytics workspace resource ID for diagnostics
Principal ID of the managed identity to grant access
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Principal ID of the managed identity to grant access
